hero.badge: A web studio, by Sami Agouram
hero.subtitle: You tell the story. We design, we code, we launch. You keep the keys, from day one.

manifesto.intro: We wanted to build the studio we would have liked to find. One that listens before proposing. One that delivers what it promised. One that stays reachable once the site is live. Nothing more, nothing less.

pillars.title: Listening first
pillars.description: Before writing code, we take the time to understand what you do, why, and for whom. The site is just a tool serving your activity, never the other way around.

pillars.title: Code, not templates
pillars.description: Every project starts from a blank page. The design comes from your need, not from a bought theme. The result looks like nobody else's.

pillars.title: Detail to the end
pillars.description: Mobile, desktop, loading speed, readability, accessibility. Everything is tested, multiple times. We don't ship until we are happy with the result.

launch.description: Dar Atlas just opened. For the first project shipped, here is a clear, win-win framework.

items.title: 30 percent off the quote
items.description: Discount applied to the fixed quote announced per offer. No hidden cost, no upcharge at delivery.

items.title: Start within 7 days
items.description: No active clients. 100 percent of studio time on your project. Demo every Friday from week one.

items.title: Public case study
items.description: Brief, technical choices, metrics, final Lighthouse score. Documented openly. You validate every line before publication.

items.title: Source code from day one
items.description: Shared GitHub repo, protected main branch, admin access on your accounts. If we part ways, you walk away with everything.

services.titleItalic: to bring your project to life.
services.description: A simple format: for each offer, a starting price, a duration and what's included. You decide with full information, no surprise on the invoice.

process.description: We call, we build, we polish, we launch. No hidden steps, no jargon. At each stage, you know exactly where we stand.

portfolio.description: A few examples of projects we like to build. Every site is shaped around its trade, its tone, its users.

testimonials.description: What clients keep telling us, after delivery.

team.description: Independent web studio, based in France. The same person handles the listening, the scoping, the design and the code, from start to finish. Zero middleman, zero handoff: you talk to the person who delivers.

faq.description: The questions we hear the most before starting. If yours is not here, write to us, we reply within 24 hours.

cta.description: 30 minutes on the phone, no strings attached. You leave with an answer, an honest opinion, or a fixed quote within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: You have an idea. We put it online.

contactPage.metaDescription: 30 minutes on the phone, no strings attached. You leave with an answered question, an honest opinion or a fixed quote within 48 hours.
contactPage.description: Fill out the form below. We reply within 24 business hours with a question, a call proposal or a fixed quote within 48 hours.
contactPage.asideNote: You're writing to a real person, not a customer service. The same one who takes the call, designs, codes and ships.

form.name: Your name
form.message: Tell us about your project in a few lines
form.messagePlaceholder: What's the goal, who are the users, what are the deadlines?
form.consent: By submitting this form, you agree that your data will be used to reply to your request. No data is shared with third parties.
form.successDescription: We reply within 24 business hours. If urgent, write directly to contact@daratlas.fr.
form.queuedDescription: Auto-delivery is not active on this site yet. To make sure your message gets through, write directly to contact@daratlas.fr. Reply within 24 hours.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again in a moment.
form.errorNetwork: Connection failed, please check your internet.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Five offers, clear starting prices, fixed quote within 48 hours. Half on signing, half on delivery.
pricingPage.description: A simple format for each type of project: a starting price, a duration, what's included. The fixed quote is sent within 48 hours after our first call.
pricingPage.paymentDescription: A clean kickoff, a smooth delivery. For longer projects, payment can split into three steps (deposit, validation, launch).

paymentBlocks.title: Standard project
paymentBlocks.description: 50% on signing, 50% on delivery. Bank transfer, Stripe or direct debit, your call.

paymentBlocks.title: Long project
paymentBlocks.description: From €8000, payment splits into three steps: deposit, design validation, going live.

paymentBlocks.title: Compliant invoices
paymentBlocks.description: VAT if applicable, full legal mentions, clear tracking on a shared workspace.

pricingPage.afterDescription: You keep the keys to everything. Hosting paid directly by you, source code available, admin access handed over. For evolutions, several options.

afterPosts.title: Hosting
afterPosts.description: Included for the first year. After that, between €0 and €20 per month, paid directly by you to the host. No hidden markup.

afterPosts.title: Bugs and fixes
afterPosts.description: 30 days of free fixes after delivery. After that, on demand at the hourly rate.

afterPosts.title: Regular maintenance
afterPosts.description: For those who want an active presence: tailored monthly retainer for updates, additions and priority support.

legal.mentionsMetaDescription: Legal information for daratlas.fr, publisher, host, intellectual property.
legal.mentionsDescription: In accordance with articles 6-III and 19 of the French Trust in the Digital Economy Act of June 21, 2004, here is the information about the publisher of the site and its host.
legal.privacyMetaDescription: Privacy policy for daratlas.fr: data collected, purposes, retention period, user rights and cookies.
legal.privacyHeading: How I handle your data, in plain English.
legal.privacyDescription: The daratlas.fr site complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act. Here is exactly what I collect, why, and for how long.
